data.text: I’ve confirmed the package already has partially duplicated logic elsewhere: `readPromptFileBounded` is the only live ingress wrapper, while the section-fitting and assembly helpers are still only used by tests. I’m checking whether those helpers are meant to replace existing production code or whether the current production paths already superseded them.

I have enough context to make the wiring decision: `ReadFileHardFail` belongs on the real prompt-file ingress path, and the section helpers can be made live by routing the review-prompt assembly through the shared evidence assembler. I’m reading the exact return path now so I can patch it without changing the emitted prompt structure more than necessary.

data.text:
Committed as `e03b2912` (`fix: wire evidence helpers into production [ddx-ae4b7393]`).

What changed:
- [`.ddx/executions/20260505T061703-ac727539/decisions.md`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-ae4b7393-20260505T061703-ac727539/.ddx/executions/20260505T061703-ac727539/decisions.md) records the WIRE/DELETE decisions, one line per symbol.
- [`cli/internal/agent/prompt_file_read.go`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-ae4b7393-20260505T061703-ac727539/cli/internal/agent/prompt_file_read.go) now routes prompt-file ingress through `evidence.ReadFileHardFail` and preserves the oversize error contract.
- [`cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review.go`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-ae4b7393-20260505T061703-ac727539/cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_review.go) now uses `evidence.AssembleInline` for the final review-prompt join.
- [`cli/internal/evidence/strategy.go`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-ae4b7393-20260505T061703-ac727539/cli/internal/evidence/strategy.go) and [`cli/internal/evidence/strategy_test.go`](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-ae4b7393-20260505T061703-ac727539/cli/internal/evidence/strategy_test.go) drop the obsolete ref-only helper and its tests.

Verification:
- `cd cli && go test ./...`
- `cd cli && go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.42.0 ./...` no longer reports dead symbols in `internal/evidence`
- `lefthook run pre-commit`

I also built `cli/build/ddx` locally so the install acceptance tests could run, but I did not commit that artifact.
